def: Singing birds; a group of the Passeres, having numeroussyringeal muscles, conferring musical ability.
Of or pertaining to the iris or rainbow.
The addition of a letter or syllable to the end of a word, aswithouten for without.
Having a redundant syllable; exceeding the common measure.Hypermetrical verse (Gr. & Lat. Pros.), a verse which contains asyllable more than the ordinary measure.
One who is skilled in zymology, or in the fermentation ofliquors.
The degree, title, or rank, of a doctor.
The coping of the scarp wall, which projects beyong the face ofthe wall a few inches.
